issues.detail: The skill does not specify how to handle missing or incomplete user context such as stage, budget, or team size.
The skill references a .claude-specific file path, indicating a vendor-specific assumption.

scenarios.name: Early-stage CLI tool with no budget
scenarios.rationale: Treatment recommends 3-5 stage- and budget-matched ideas (Easy Keyword Ranking, Reddit Marketing, Comment Marketing, Engineering as Marketing) with concrete first steps and expected outcomes; baseline lists generic content/SEO advice without audience match or specific implementation.

scenarios.name: B2B SaaS with defined $15K/month budget
scenarios.rationale: Treatment splits the budget across LinkedIn Ads, Conference Sponsorship, and Integration Marketing tied to the HR audience, plus content (Comparison Pages) and email nurturing of the existing list; baseline names channels but lacks allocation, audience targeting, and existing-asset leverage.
